subject: [PATCH v2 100/110] zonefs: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Damien Le Moal
reviews.summary: Acked the patch without raising any concerns or suggestions.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch series replaces the PRIino format macro with concrete format strings in zonefs, reflecting that i_ino is now a u64 type.
